news.headline: Gladney Center for Adoption receives grant from Lowe's to benefit foster kids facility in TX.
news.summary: Lowe's has awarded a grant that will support Gladney Center for Adoption in Fort Worth, Texas, a renowned adoption services agency. This grant comes as part of the 2024 Lowe's Hometowns initiative. The Gladney Center, known for its work in helping foster children, is set to benefit significantly from this funding. This news was officially disclosed on June 27, 2024.

news.headline: CleanSpark buys GRIID for $155M in stock, to boost power grid by over 400MW in 2 years.
news.summary: CleanSpark has completed the acquisition of GRIID through an all-stock deal. This strategic move is projected to increase the company's power grid capacity by over 400 megawatts within the next two years.

news.headline: USX Cyber launches GUARDIENT XDR cybersecurity platform for MSPs in Vienna, VA on June 27, 2024.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in Vienna, Virginia, USX Cyber, a prominent cybersecurity solutions provider, introduced GUARDIENT, a state-of-the-art eXtended Detection and Response (XDR) platform tailored for Managed Service Providers (MSPs) catering to small businesses.

news.headline: dynaCERT expands into oil & gas market with 84 HydraGEN™ Units order, on top of recent 18 units order.
news.summary: In Toronto, dynaCERT Inc. disclosed a new purchase order of eighty-four (84) HG1 HydraGEN™ Units from Simply Green Distributors Inc. The units are intended for the top oil and gas drilling contractor in Canada. Previously, Simply Green had also ordered eighteen (18) HG1 HydraGEN™ Technology Units. The company's stocks are listed as TSX: DYA, OTCMKTS: DYFSF, and FRA: DMJ. This move aims to reduce carbon emissions.

news.headline: Walgreens to close 'significant' stores due to weak consumer spending, impacting retail operations as strategy questioned.
news.summary: The pharmacy company disclosed to investors that its retail operations were being impacted by the unsteady consumer spending. However, skepticism arose as some believe the company's strategy also played a role in this issue.

news.headline: Global Battery Management System market to reach $22.0 billion by 2029, with CAGR of 19.3% from $9.1 billion in 2024.
news.summary: A recent report by MarketsandMarkets™ predicts significant growth in the global battery management system (BMS) market. Currently valued at USD 9.1 billion in 2024, the market is expected to reach USD 22.0 billion by 2029, showcasing a remarkable Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 19.3%. This surge highlights the increasing demand for battery management systems worldwide.

news.headline: ACP promotes fire safety standards and model ordinance for energy storage. Article released on June 27, 2024.
news.summary: Today, the American Clean Power Association (ACP) unveiled a significant policy initiative to advance national fire safety standards and released a model ordinance for state and local governments to follow. This effort aims to enhance safety measures and prevent fire hazards across the country. The announcement was made in Portland, Oregon on June 27, 2024. The ACP's support for these standards and the publication of the model ordinance mark crucial steps in improving fire safety protocols. This development is poised to benefit numerous communities and establishments by providing a clear framework to follow.

news.headline: Global Military Land Vehicles Market to reach USD 34.6B by 2033, growing at 7.4% CAGR. In 2023, it was at USD 16.2B. Offering, product type, and application lead trends in the industry.
news.summary: The global Military Land Vehicles Market was valued at around USD 16.2 Billion in 2023 and is projected to reach USD 17.3 Billion in 2024, with expectations to hit around USD 34.6 Billion by 2033, at a CAGR of about 7.4%. The market report covers offerings like platforms and services, product types such as Infantry Fighting Vehicles, Armored Personnel Carriers, etc., and applications like Defense and Combat or Logistics and Transportation. The trend in military land vehicles is towards more sophisticated and versatile systems driven by advancements in technology like automation, AI, and electrification. Modular designs and shared platforms are gaining importance for simplifying logistics and reducing costs in various operational situations. Emphasis is also on greener propulsion systems due to environmental concerns. The report also highlights the dominance of segments like platforms, infantry fighting vehicles, and defense and combat applications. Rheinmetall AG is a key player in this industry known for providing a range of military vehicle systems and services. The North American market is witnessing a focus on technical innovation to enhance vehicle performance and survivability, resulting in modernization initiatives.

news.headline: NIQ partners with TikTok to launch report on TikTok Shop, analyzing consumer trends to help brands connect better.
news.summary: In Chicago, NIQ, a prominent company in measurement and data analytics, has unveiled a new detailed report created in partnership with TikTok. The report delves into the in-app commerce feature, TikTok Shop, shedding light on evolving consumer shopping trends. It offers valuable insights for brands seeking to engage effectively with their audience on TikTok. This report marks a significant advancement in NIQ's measurement capabilities introduced in October 2023.

news.headline: Supreme Court rejects Purdue Pharma bankruptcy plan allocating billions from Sackler family and shields them from lawsuits. Setback for victims and governments.
news.summary: The Supreme Court has dismissed a bankruptcy plan for Purdue Pharma, the manufacturer of OxyContin, which aimed to assign billions from the Sackler family to address opioid addiction. The plan would have protected the Sacklers from civil lawsuits regarding their alleged involvement in the opioid crisis. This 5-4 ruling represents a win for a faction of opioid victims who opposed the settlement in order to pursue legal action against the Sacklers. Conversely, it is a setback for the majority of victims, as well as state and local governments, who had agreed to the settlement. According to the Wall Street Journal, this decision stands out as one of the most significant bankruptcy rulings made by the Supreme Court, limiting the ability of companies and their executives to utilize bankruptcy proceedings... (Full details can be found on Benzinga.com)

news.headline: Paypal stock price fell by 1.8% to $58.26 while S&P 500 gained 0.16%. Paypal lost 4.57% in a month. Earnings projection: EPS $0.95, down 18.1%; revenue $7.78 billion, up 6.7%. Market eager for Paypal's upcoming earnings disclosure.
news.summary: Paypal (NASDAQ: PYPL) closed the latest trading session at $58.26, marking a -1.8% change from the previous day. This shift was lower compared to the S&P 500's 0.16% gain, while the Dow saw an increase of 0.04% and the tech-heavy Nasdaq rose by 0.49%. Over the past month, PYPL shares dropped by 4.57%, contrasting with a 5.94% gain in the Computer and Technology sector and a 3.22% increase in the S&P 500. Investors are keenly awaiting Paypal's upcoming earnings report, with an expected EPS of $0.95, down 18.1% from the same quarter last year. Revenue is projected to be $7.78 billion, up by 6.7% from the previous year's figure. This information and more can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Shopify's stock rises 11.32% in a month, outperforming S&P 500. EPS projected at $0.21, revenue at $2 billion. - Benzinga
news.summary: During the latest market close, Shopify (NYSE: SHOP) reached $65.45, indicating a 1.03% increase from the previous day, outperforming the S&P 500's daily gain of 0.16%. While the Dow saw a 0.04% increase and the Nasdaq, known for its tech-heavy composition, rose by 0.49%. Over the last month, Shopify's stock has surged by 11.32%, surpassing the Computer and Technology sector's gain of 5.94% and the S&P 500's rise of 3.22%.Investors are eagerly awaiting Shopify's upcoming earnings report, with an estimated EPS of $0.21, marking a 50% jump from the same quarter last year. Additionally, the consensus revenue estimate for the company stands at $2 billion, reflecting an 18.15% increase from the equivalent quarter in the previous year. The investment community remains attentive to Shopify's performance as it prepares to disclose its financial results.

news.headline: Marathon Petroleum stock closed at $174.81, dropped by -0.22%, underperforming S&P 500's gain of 0.16%. Potential EPS rise to $6.05.
news.summary: Marathon Petroleum (NYSE: MPC) closed at $174.81 in the latest trading session, experiencing a slight decline of -0.22% from the previous day, while the S&P 500 saw a daily increase of 0.16%. In comparison, the Dow rose by 0.04% and the tech-heavy Nasdaq by 0.49%.Over the past month, MPC shares dropped by 2.22%, underperforming the Oils-Energy sector's loss of 0.71% and lagging behind the S&P 500's gain of 3.22%.Investors are eagerly awaiting Marathon Petroleum's upcoming earnings report scheduled for August 6, 2024. Analysts predict an EPS of $6.05, indicating a 13.72% growth from the same period last year. Current estimates anticipate a revenue of $31.85 billion, a 13.52% increase from previous figures.

news.headline: Shareholders approved all resolutions with an average rate of 97.98% in the General Meeting on June 26, 2024.
Denali Capital Acquisition Corp (NASDAQ: DECA) and Longevity Biomedical, Inc terminated their business combination agreement.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Denali Capital Acquisition Corp. (NASDAQ: DECA) disclosed the decision to terminate the Business Combination Agreement with Longevity Biomedical, Inc. The parties have mutually agreed to this termination, prompting Denali and its sponsor to explore other options to complete the initial business combination. This development marks a significant shift in the anticipated collaboration between the two entities, leading to reassessment and potential restructuring of their business strategies. The termination of the agreement signifies a redirection of efforts and resources towards seeking alternative avenues for realizing an initial business combination. This decision reflects a change in the corporate roadmap for both Denali and Longevity Biomedical, Inc., signaling a new phase in their respective pursuits of growth and strategic partnerships.

news.headline: CleanSpark to acquire GRIID in $155M deal, paving way for 400MW power capacity in Tennessee. CEO highlights growth.
news.summary: CleanSpark, a Bitcoin mining company, has recently announced a new deal that presents them with an opportunity to access up to 400 megawatts of power capacity in Tennessee. The CEO of CleanSpark expressed enthusiasm for this development, indicating that it offers a clear pathway for the company to scale up its operations significantly. This potential increase in power capacity aligns with CleanSpark's strategic goals and could have a significant impact on their mining capabilities in the near future.

news.headline: Citycon Treasury B.V. chooses Ireland as its Home Member State for regulatory purposes. Announcement made in Amsterdam on June 27, 2024.
news.summary: Citycon Treasury B.V., located at Hullenbergweg 300, 1101 BV Amsterdam, has announced on June 27, 2024, their decision to select Ireland as their Home Member State. This election is for specific purposes related to the company's operations.

news.headline: High Speed Motors Market projected to reach $21.7 billion by 2032 with 5.7% CAGR. Segment includes products like Induction Motor, Permanent Magnet Motor, amongst others.
news.summary: In Bangalore, India, on June 27, 2024, data shows that the High Speed Motors Market is divided by product types including Induction Motor, Permanent Magnet Motor, and others. The market is also segmented by power range into High Voltage and Low Voltage categories. This market is further categorized by application areas such as Machine Tools, Power Generation, Compressor, Bearings, and others. This global market analysis offers insights into the trends and demands within the industry, helping businesses understand the dynamics of the High Speed Motors Market.

news.headline: Mark Peters appointed as MITRE's new CEO, replacing Jason Providakes upon retirement, effective Sept. 3, 2024.
news.summary: McClean, Virginia—MITRE has announced the appointment of Dr. Mark Peters as its 10th president and CEO, starting on September 3, 2024. Dr. Peters will succeed Dr. Jason Providakes, who is set to retire from his position.

news.headline: Anumana's study reveals AI algorithm can detect pulmonary hypertension early using ECG data, promising impactful advances.
news.summary: In Cambridge, Massachusetts, recent data from a study by Anumana reveals that an AI algorithm displays promise in identifying pulmonary hypertension at an early stage by analyzing ECG data. The study underscores the potential for early detection of this condition through the use of AI technology.

news.headline: Polestar delivers first customer Polestar 3 electric SUVs, two continents, summer deliveries, global acclaim.
news.summary: In Gothenburg, Sweden, Polestar (NASDAQ: PSNY) successfully completed its initial customer deliveries of the Polestar 3 SUV, marking a significant milestone for the Company which now boasts three models in its lineup, including two SUVs. The first batch of vehicles is being distributed to customers on two continents, with a surge in deliveries expected over the summer months. The Polestar 3 has garnered positive reviews from international automotive press, generating substantial customer interest in the electric vehicle.

news.headline: TotalEnergies sells North Sea assets, including fields and gas plant, to Prax Group. Assets produce 7,500 BOE/day, 90% gas. Staff transfer included.
news.summary: TotalEnergies SE, listed on NYSE as TTE, has reached an agreement to sell its West of Shetland assets to The Prax Group, subject to regulatory clearance. The assets to be transferred include various fields, the Shetland Gas Plant, and exploration licenses. These assets, categorized as mature, currently yield around 7,500 barrels of oil equivalent daily, with the majority comprising gas at 90%. As per the deal, employees relevant to these assets would also shift from TotalEnergies to Prax as per legal requirements. Jean-Luc Guiziou, the Senior Vice President of Europe for Exploration, expressed insights on this transaction. For detailed information, the complete story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Wells Fargo (WFC) stock closed at $57.01, -0.33% from the previous day. -3.83% loss in a month, EPS of $1.27 expected on July 12, 2024.
news.summary: Wells Fargo (stock ticker: WFC) ended the latest trading session at $57.01, a decrease of 0.33% from the day before. This performance fell short of the S&P 500's 0.16% daily increase, while the Dow saw a 0.04% rise, and the tech-heavy Nasdaq climbed by 0.49%.Over the past month, shares of the top U.S. mortgage lender dropped by 3.83%, lagging behind the Finance sector's 0.22% loss and the S&P 500's 3.22% gain.Investors are eagerly awaiting Wells Fargo's upcoming earnings report scheduled for July 12, 2024. Analysts predict an earnings per share (EPS) of $1.27, representing a 1.6% uptick from the same quarter last year. Additionally, current consensus estimates forecast revenues of $20.26 billion.

news.headline: Elanco Animal Health's stock fell due to FDA label updates for Zenrelia. Approval expected in late Q3 2024, with a U.S. launch in Q4 2024. Investors react to box-label warning on safety.
news.summary: Elanco Animal Health's stock (NYSE:ELAN) is declining following updates on FDA approval timelines for Zenrelia, a JAK Inhibitor for dogs with pruritus. FDA confirmed completion of major technical sections in June and expects completion of the minor technical section by mid-July. The final administrative review will follow, likely leading to approval in late Q3 2024 with a U.S. launch in Q4 2024. Investors are concerned about a possible boxed warning on Zenrelia's label due to safety issues observed in a trial with unvaccinated dogs receiving doses above the recommended level. Bobby Modi, Elanco Executive Vice President, anticipates this warning based on the trial outcome.

news.headline: SSP International hires a diverse faculty group of 48 for the 2024 Summer Science Program. Exciting growth in diversity.
news.summary: The Summer Science Program is pleased to announce that 48 faculty members will be participating this year, marking a record-breaking number. These individuals come from diverse backgrounds in terms of age, ethnicity, experience, and areas of expertise. The program, organized by SSP International (SSP), a nonprofit organization dedicated to providing immersive science education experiences, is set to take place in New York starting June 27, 2024. The participation of such a varied group of faculty members promises to offer a rich and dynamic learning environment for all participants.

news.headline: Greenix Pest Control, 14th largest in U.S., acquires 4 Insight Pest Solutions branches in Wisconsin, Ohio, Indiana.
news.summary: In OREM, Utah on June 27, 2024, Greenix Pest Control, the 14th largest pest control provider in the United States, revealed its acquisition of four Insight Pest Solutions branches located in Wisconsin, Ohio, and Indiana. This strategic move signifies a significant expansion for Greenix Pest Control and reinforces its position in the pest control industry.

news.headline: EWR Digital, a digital marketing agency, celebrates 25 years of success in Texas. Internet growth fuels their growth.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024 in Houston, the digital marketing industry is thriving with the rise of the internet, leading to a high demand for digital marketing services to help businesses connect with clients. Despite the fleeting nature of trends and agencies in this rapidly evolving field, achieving long-term success is uncommon. Today, we acknowledge the resilience and innovation in the industry as companies strive to navigate this dynamic landscape.

news.headline: Purdue Pharma settlement at risk post-Supreme Court ruling. Talks resume without $6 billion provision.
news.summary: Both the plaintiffs and the company have committed to entering renegotiations, but the discussions are anticipated to be tough following the court's rejection of a demand made by the Sacklers in exchange for $6 billion.

news.headline: Lucky Energy Drink's new ad campaign "Athletes" challenges unrealistic athletic standards. Launches in Austin, Texas on June 27, 2024.
news.summary: A new beverage campaign titled "Athletes" by Lucky Energy drink has been launched in Austin, Texas on June 27, 2024. The campaign challenges the unrealistic and exaggerated portrayal of athletic success in society. The message of the campaign is to empower individuals who may not fit the typical "IT" athlete stereotype by saying "So F**king What?! Keep Going!" This bold ad campaign aims to inspire and motivate people to push through limitations and continue striving for success.

news.headline: Hyundai Santa Cruz tops Midsize Pickup segment, advances 7 ranks to 3rd among brands, Elantra and Tucson rank 3rd.
news.summary: The Santa Cruz Sport Adventure Vehicle has become the leader in the Midsize Pickup segment. Hyundai has made significant progress by moving up seven positions to secure the third spot among mass-market brands. The Hyundai Elantra has clinched the third spot in the competitive Compact Car segment. Meanwhile, the Hyundai Tucson has also secured the third spot in the popular Compact SUV segment. These achievements were noted in Fountain Valley.

news.headline: Voltalia has disclosed results of its third employee share plan, with participation from 82% of its workforce.
authID closed $11 million Registered Direct Offering by selling 1,464,965 shares at $7.50 each, with total gross proceeds.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, authID Inc. (NASDAQ: AUID), a top provider of biometric identity verification solutions, completed its Registered Direct Offering by selling 1,464,965 shares of common stock at a price of $7.50 per share (or $8.16 per share for Company directors). The total gross proceeds from the offering reached $11,000,000 million, excluding placement agent fees and other expenses.

news.headline: Novo Nordisk will restrict initial Wegovy sales in China due to high demand. Over half of China's population is overweight or obese.
news.summary: Novo Nordisk A/S (NYSE:NVO) is strategizing to restrict initial sales of its obesity treatment Wegovy in China in order to manage demand effectively amidst global supply challenges. A survey by China’s National Health Commission unveiled that more than half of the country's 1.4 billion citizens are categorized as overweight or obese. Maziar Mike Doustdar, Novo Nordisk’s chief of international operations, expressed the company's intention to introduce Wegovy in China promptly, while emphasizing the importance of maintaining a consistent supply globally. China has recently granted approval for Wegovy, presenting a novel weight loss alternative in a market where Novo Nordisk's older generation weight-loss drug, Saxenda, was linked to reduced bone mass density in a study.

news.headline: PCE inflation report anticipated to reveal minimal to no price rises in the previous month.
GetReal Labs launches to fight malicious content & deepfakes, led by top experts. Headquartered in Calif., founded June 27, 2024.
news.summary: GetReal Labs, headquartered in San Mateo, California, revealed on June 27, 2024, that they have united cutting-edge technology with renowned media forensics and cybersecurity specialists to combat deception. As a global leader in identifying malicious manipulated content and deepfakes, the company aims to provide unparalleled protection.

news.headline: Ronald Mason Jr., JD, to receive 2024 Marie Fielder Medal in Washington, D.C. for educational leadership.
news.summary: In July, Fielding Graduate University will recognize Ronald Mason Jr., JD, an influential figure in education and champion of inclusion, in Washington, DC. Mason, the former president of the University of the District of Columbia (UDC), will receive an award for his contributions.

news.headline: Economist reassures AI bubble concerns, cites semiconductor sell-off by Nvidia Corp. falling over 13%. Market viewed as different due to high-quality leading companies.
news.summary: Market analysts and economists are debating the possibility of an AI bubble bursting akin to the dot-com crash of the early 2000s and the potential economic fallout. Concerns have heightened recently following a semiconductor selloff, notably with Nvidia Corp. (NASDAQ:NVDA) experiencing a 13% decline from its peak last week. Chief economist Jeffrey Roach, Ph.D., from LPL Financial, has dismissed bubble fears, highlighting the productivity gains from innovative technologies like AI. Roach believes the current situation differs significantly from the late-1990s tech bubble, citing high-quality companies as a key distinction. For more details, visit the full article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Hampton Inn Louisville Airport finishes $6.2M renovation led by Commonwealth Hotels based in Covington, Kentucky.
news.summary: In a recent update from Covington, Kentucky, Commonwealth Hotels revealed the successful finish of a major renovation project valued at $6.2 million for the Hampton Inn Louisville. The project included extensive upgrades to both the interior and exterior of the hotel.

news.headline: CTP secures €500M unsecured sustainability loan & €500M bond tender offer, diversifying funding sources at 4.7% interest.
news.summary: In Amsterdam, a recent update states that CTP, the largest listed developer, owner, and manager of industrial and logistics properties in Europe based on gross lettable area (GLA), has accomplished a significant milestone. They have secured a 5-year unsecured syndicated sustainability-linked loan facility totaling €500 million. This loan comes with a fixed all-in cost of 4.7%, enabling CTP to enhance its funding streams. Notable collaborators in this endeavor were SMBC Bank EU AG and ING, who served as Global Coordinators and Sustainability Coordinators.

news.headline: CDO Travel & Hospitality Exchange returns for its second year on 11-12 September 2024 at Hilton Syon Park in London, uniting senior data leaders from the travel sector.
news.summary: London, on June 27, 2024, The CDO Travel & Hospitality Exchange, which had a successful debut in 2023, is set to return for its second edition on September 11-12, 2024. The event will take place at the Hilton Syon Park in London, providing a platform for senior data executives in the travel industry to convene. This year, attendees can expect an even larger gathering of professionals from around the globe to exchange insights and network.

news.headline: Opioid settlement at risk as Supreme Court ruling jeopardizes $6B exchange between plaintiffs and Purdue. negotiations ahead.
news.summary: The individuals suing and the corporation have pledged to engage in new negotiations, but the discussions will likely be difficult following a court ruling that invalidated a condition that the Sackler family had demanded in return for $6 billion.

news.headline: Ellucian appoints Kevin Francis as Chief Revenue Officer to drive global growth in higher education sector.
news.summary: Kevin Francis has been appointed as Chief Revenue Officer by Ellucian, a prominent provider of technology solutions for higher education. The announcement was made on June 27, 2024, in Reston, Virginia. Francis, an Enterprise Software Sales Executive, will play a key role in driving global growth for the company and supporting higher education institutions in their efforts to empower student success. This move is aimed at further solidifying Ellucian's position as a leader in the industry and expanding its reach to cater to the needs of an increasing number of institutions worldwide. The appointment of Kevin Francis reflects Ellucian's strategic focus on enhancing sales and revenue generation, as well as strengthening partnerships with educational organizations.

news.headline: The Skin Center expanding with new locations in Dublin and Westlake, Ohio after success in Gahanna and Shaker Heights.
news.summary: After experiencing success with its establishments in Gahanna and Shaker Heights, OH, The Skin Center, a renowned medical spa, is expanding its operations in response to high demand from clients. The new locations in Columbus, Ohio are set to accommodate a growing number of customers seeking exceptional skincare services. This expansion marks a significant milestone for the company as it continues to establish itself as a leading provider in the industry.

news.headline: ArtPrize 2024 sees record registration numbers - over 1,600 artists from 53 countries; event runs Sep 13-28 in Grand Rapids.
news.summary: Grand Rapids, Michigan will host the popular international art competition and cultural event, ArtPrize, from September 13 to 28, 2024. This year's edition will see a significant rise in participation, with a notable increase in both the number of artists and entries compared to previous years.

news.headline: Jack in the Box launches new Mini Chimi Bang Bangs inspired by Marvel's "Deadpool & Wolverine", joining other beloved tiny foods.
news.summary: In San Diego, Jack in the Box, Inc. (NASDAQ: JACK) unveiled a new addition to their menu - Mini Chimi Bang Bangs, to coincide with the release of Marvel Studios’ “Deadpool & Wolverine” on July 26. This limited-time item joins the brand’s popular small options like Tiny Tacos and Mini Churros. The new Mini Chimi Bang Bangs are set to be as flavorful as their counterparts and will be available for order at Jack in the Box.

news.headline: Stellus Private Credit BDC declares $0.50 Q3 2024 dividend, $0.1666 monthly, payable in July, August, September.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Stellus Private Credit BDC revealed that their Board of Trustees approved a monthly dividend of $0.1666 for July, August, and September, summing up to $0.50 per share for the third quarter of 2024.

news.headline: VARs software market to grow at 11% CAGR, segmented by type and application; global opportunity analysis for 2024-2030.
news.summary: In Bangalore, India, as of June 27, 2024, the Value-Added Resellers (VARs) Software Market is undergoing segmentation by type into On-premise and Cloud-based categories, and by application into Large Enterprises and SMEs. The industry forecast for the period of 2024 to 2030 highlights a global opportunity for growth and development within the VARs sector.

news.headline: Gale Literature Resource Center updates to support primary source literacy & critical thinking.  New features include portals, integrations, and curated sets of historical documents. ALA Annual 2024 conference announced enhancements.
news.summary: At the ALA Annual 2024 Conference in San Diego, on June 27, 2024, Gale, a division of Cengage Group, announced significant improvements to Gale Literature. These enhancements include the introduction of new portals, integrations, and carefully curated collections of historical documents. These updates are designed to bolster primary source literacy and promote the development of critical thinking skills.

news.headline: Phyn partners with Amica Insurance to protect homes from water damage; offers leak detection devices to policyholders.
news.summary: Phyn, a prominent provider of intelligent water solutions, has revealed a partnership with Amica Insurance, a top provider of auto, home, and life insurance. This collaboration aims to enhance home protection and reduce water-related damages by providing Amica policyholders access to Phyn's acclaimed range of leak detection devices. Phyn's innovative technology serves to safeguard a residence's plumbing infrastructure, preventing leaks and ensuring its overall water integrity. Moreover, it enables homeowners to practice water conservation and averts potential unnecessary losses.

news.headline: 78% of organizations view AI as a growing risk, despite 50% using it for efficiency. - Business Wire
news.summary: In Los Angeles, AuditBoard released findings from its recent 2024 Digital Risk Report titled "Opportunities and Challenges of the AI Frontier." The report reveals that 78% of organizations are monitoring AI as a growing risk while also integrating it into their operations. Over 50% of surveyed enterprises stated they utilize AI to boost productivity and elevate their digital capabilities. This indicates a significant trend towards embracing AI despite recognizing associated risks, highlighting the industry's shift towards leveraging advanced technologies for strategic advantage.
